paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.28, representing a 2.53 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 21 sessions, the stock price has decreased by 30.04 percent.

There are 2 new news items in the last 24 hours, including announcements from TradingView and FinanzNachrichten.de regarding Fermi Inc.'s second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, which is scheduled for August 13, 2026.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K form on July 15, 2026, disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and an 8-K form on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
